7649477031775800584.name: Mexican Chicken Corn Salad
7649477031775800584.description: Meals for Weight-loss: Ep 6 Mexican Chicken Corn Salad Full recipe link in bio!  Ingredients:  Chicken * Chicken breast, 800 g * Lime juice, 2 tbsp * Avocado oil, 1 tbsp * Chili powder, 2 tsp * Cumin, 1.5 tsp * Garlic powder, 1 tsp * Paprika, 1 tsp * Salt, 1 tsp * Black pepper, 0.5 tsp Veggies * Cotija cheese, 50 g * Red onion, 1 large, finely diced * Red bell pepper, 1 large, finely diced * Cilantro, 1 handful, chopped * Jalapeños, 3, finely diced * Canned corn, 2 cups total, drained and charred Sauce * Plain 0% Greek yogurt, 1 cup * Lime juice, from 0.5 lime * Hot sauce, 1 tbsp * Tajín, 1 tbsp * Water, 0.5 cup * Salt, to taste * Black pepper, to taste Instructions 1. Cut the chicken breast into bite-sized cubes, then add it to a bowl with lime juice, avocado oil, chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Mix well and marinate for 15 to 30 minutes. 2. Heat a large pan on medium-high heat. Add the marinated chicken and cook for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until browned and fully cooked to 165°F. 3. Drain the canned corn really well and pat it dry with paper towel. In the same pan or a clean hot pan, add the corn in a single layer and let it sit untouched for 2 to 3 minutes, then stir and cook another 2 to 3 minutes until charred in spots. 4. In a bowl, mix Greek yogurt, lime juice, hot sauce, Tajín, water, salt, and black pepper until smooth. 5. In a large bowl, add the charred corn, red onion, red bell pepper, cilantro, jalapeños, and cotija cheese. 6. Pour in the sauce and mix everything until coated. 7. Divide the chicken and street corn salad mixture into 4 servings. Store chilled and eat within 3 to 4 days. Nutrition (Per Serving, 4 servings) * Calories: 475 * Protein: 58g * Carbs: 30g * Fat: 18g The goal is 40lbs in 90 daysBeen a slow grind, hit a plateau at 20 lbs but we are staying locked in!  #homecooking #easyrecipe #chicken #sesamechicken #takeout      created by amateurprochef with Anderson .Paak’s Make It Better (Instrumental)

7220915393426738453.name: Crispy Tuna Patties
7220915393426738453.description: I used to hate canned tuna until I started making these crispy tuna patties in 20 minutes. Hmm, that is incredible. Start with some flaked light tuna. Drain out the water so it's completely dry. Squeeze a lemon. This cuts out the fishy taste. Red onions and green onions, this will give your patties a nice crunch. Crack some eggs. That's to bind everything together. Any bread crumbs or crushed corn flakes, this is for crispiness and structure so your patties don't fall apart. Salt pepper paprika minced garlic and chopped cilantro, simple spices to give you all the flavor. add some light Mayo for creaminess and any hot sauce for a spicy kick. And that's it. Mix well. Now take your mix and make some patties. Cook them on a pan for a few minutes on each side until crispy and enjoy.

7620998204569488653.name: Mediterranean Charred Carrots
7620998204569488653.description: This is how you can make an incredible Mediterranean charred carrot appetizer or salad. It's one of my favorite ways to do roasted carrots and one of the best easy, healthy appetizers or salads you can make at home. I use some peeled and cut carrots here, but you could also use squash or even sweet potato. Toss on olive oil, season with salt, pepper, and a few easy spices. Roast them in the oven on high heat for about 20 minutes. I serve these over a whipped yogurt spread. Just processed yogurt with garlic, tahini, and fresh herbs. Spread it at the base of a plate, add the carrots and enjoy! Full recipes in the caption. Check it out!

7620924633876794654.name: The Best Green Sauce
7620924633876794654.description: I think I just invented the best sauce of all time, and it's great on literally everything. To a blender add 1/3 cup mayonnaise, 1/3 cup Greek yogurt, 1 cup fresh cilantro, 1/2 cup fresh basil, 1/4 cup fresh mint and parsley, 2 jalapenos with the seeds removed 1 tablespoon ají Amarillo paste, zest and juice of 1 whole lime, 1 teaspoon white wine vinegar and honey, 1/4 teaspoon Dijon mustard and a pinch of salt. Then while blending, drizzle in 1/4 cup of olive oil and I promise this will be the most dangerously addictive sauce you'll ever taste.

7620179740317568287.name: 100g Protein Tiramisu
7620179740317568287.description: Welcome back to don't call it a cheat meal. This is the 100 g protein tiramisu, and it only takes four ingredients. Grab a tub of vanilla Greek yogurt, mix in two tablespoons of espresso and vanilla bean paste before inserting some ladyfinger cookies and letting this fridge for a few hours. You won't believe how good this tastes. So stop saving my videos and actually make this one yourself.

7583782664184810765.name: Buffalo Chicken Hot Pockets
7583782664184810765.description: If you're looking for high protein meal prep to make this week, these Buffalo Chicken Hot Pockets are gonna blow your mind. These have better macros than most protein bars, and you can just throw them in the freezer and reheat them in less than five minutes. So if you're ready to cook, let me show you how to make them. You can actually use rotisserie chicken here, but I like to just make my own by combining chicken breast with all of these things in a slow cooker and cooking for about two to three hours. Right before the chicken is done, we're gonna throw together this high protein buffalo sauce using a blender. Now shred up the chicken, add the buffalo sauce to it, along with mozzarella and chives until you have something like this to make the dough. Just weigh out these ingredients and go in with your hands until you have a clumpy mixture. Now take your time and knead this dough for just a few minutes until it looks smooth like this. Cut into 10 equal pieces and shape them into balls. Roll these balls out until they're very thin. Add some chicken and mozzarella on top and pinch the edges together to make the Hot Pocket. Now just toast them in a pan until golden brown, wrap them up, and enjoy.

7604567294433430806.name: High Protein Strawberry Mousse
7604567294433430806.description: Wonder you're struggling to lose weight? You haven't tried this? High protein strawberry mousse, 55 grams of protein and under 300 calories. Just add to your bowl 250 mils of boiling water, one sugar free jelly mix and put that to the side. 290 grams of 0% Greek yogurt to a blender, one scoop of vanilla protein powder, add your jelly mix and then blend. By the way, I'm posting tasty high protein recipes to help you lose fat every week. So drop me a follow. Finally, pour it into a bowl and let it in the fridge for 2 to 3 hours.

7575820537453120789.name: The Best Protein Brownies
7575820537453120789.description: I accidentally created the best protein brownies on the internet. This batch has 102 grams of protein with each brownie only have a 99 calories. They're gooey, chocolatey and moist. And the best part is they're so easy to make. Mix flour, cocoa and protein powder, sweetener and salt and give it a whisk into a blender. Cup with your wet ingredients, cottage cheese, egg whites, eggs, vanilla extract, maple syrup and apple sauce. Blend for 10 seconds and slowly add to your dry mix until you get the best brownie batter. Add some choc chips if you please, and then bake in the oven for 12 to 15 minutes. Make sure to let them cool before eating. And I guarantee these will be the best protein brownies you've ever tried.

7642840953518181645.name: Cinnamon Roll Bites
7642840953518181645.description:
Y'all, I just made these soft, pillowy cinnamon roll bites in 20 minutes with an amazing vanilla bean ice. You get to eat the soft, gooey, pillowy part of the cinnamon roll without any yeast and without any waiting. Now, I was craving cinnamon rolls and didn't want all that work, and this is so easy. Just combine all your dry ingredients in one bowl. Now, just set this bowl to the side, and in our cup of warmed milk, we're gonna add our melted butter, some of our homemade vanilla extract. This recipe will be just fine. It does not have to be homemade. I'll just pour the milky mixture into the flour and fold until a soft dough ball forms. And once formed into a ball, flatten the dough 2 inches wide. And then you want to cut them into 10 equal pieces, and then cut those equal pieces in half. And now into the bowl of the cinnamon bites, we're gonna add melted butter, some of that delicious cinnamon sugar. Sugar. Make sure they soak up all that cinnamon sugar. We don't want to leave any of it behind. You can bake them in a bread loaf pan. But for all y'all beautiful visual learners, I'm gonna make it in this cast iron. just bake for around 10 minutes at 375 degrees until lightly golden. And just to feel a little bit fancy, we're gonna add the innards of one vanilla bean into the icing. Guys, words cannot describe how good these look. It might be the best thing I've ever made.

7649490656645205270.name: Galatopita
7649490656645205270.description:
[Transcript]
Πάμε λοιπόν να φτιάξουμε μια γαλατόπιτα Η γαλατόπιτα έχει πολλές εκδοχές όλη την Ελλάδα, στη Μακεδονία την κάνουμε φύλλο Εμείς εδώ στην Μεστινιά την κάνουμε γυμνή χωρίς φύλλο, ένα χιλό το οποίο τον ψήνουμε στο φούρνο Αυτή είναι η δική μας εκδοχή Πάμε λοιπόν τώρα να δούμε πώς την κάνουμε από την αρχή Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε δύο μήτρα γαλαπλύρες Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε λοιπόν το σιγδάλι το οποίο αν το θέλουμε υφή Να είναι σαν γαρακτομπούρκο θα βάλουμε συμπτάλι ψηλό Αν δεν θέλουμε σαν χαρβά, υφή πάλι γιατί ξεγουσάρουμε θα βάλουμε χομπιό Εγώ κάνω κάτι ανάμεκτο Οπότε 375 γραμμάρες θα σπάω Γιατί τσιμουσάρουμε, θα βάλουμε χοντρό. Εγώ κάνω κάτι ανάμεικτο, οπότε 175 γραμμάρια θα σπάω σε μισό χοντρό, μισό ψηλό. Στη συνέδεια θα προσθέσουμε 6 με 7 αυγά χτυπημένα 395 γραμμάρια ζάχαρη κρυσταρική και 2 κουταλιές της σούπας βούτυρο εγωπρόβιο, αυτό που βάζουμε και στους κουραμπιέδες. Και στο τέλος, ξύρισμα από 2 λεμόνια βιολογικά αγκέρωτα. Σε μια κατσαρόλα με χοντρό πάτο, γιατί ο χοντρός πάτος αποτέχει το γάλα να καεί. Και να κολλήσει, βάζουμε όλο μας. Ο χοντρός πάτος αποτέπει το γάλα να καεί για να κολλήσει βάζουμε όλοι όμως το γάλα Προσθένουμε το σινιγδάλι μέσα στο γάλα Σβηστεί η φωτιά ακόμα Προσθένουμε τη ζάχαρη Ανάβουμε τη φωτιά Και ξεκινάμε να ανακατεύουμε συνεχώς Μέχρι αυτό να αρχίσει να βγάλει χοντρές φουσκάλες Έχει πήξει Βγάζει χοντρές βουρμπουλίδρες Αυτές οι χοντρές βουρμπουλίδρες θέλουμε να αρχίσουμε να βλέπουμε Θέλουμε λίγο βαρματίλα Ωραία άρωμα Και τώρα δίνουμε το ξύσμα από δύο λεμόνια Λοιπόν, έχουμε αλευρώσει με ελαιόλαδο ένα ταψάκι Βάζουμε πόλικο αλεύρι Να το αλευρώσουμε καλά Γιατί αυτό θα μην φούρνο Και μην ξεχνάμε ότι πένει φούρνο κολλάει απλά καν Θα απλώσουμε το μείγμα μέσα Απλά δεν πρέπει να μας περάσει σε ύψος τα 4 εκατοστά Γιατί μετά δεν θα ψηθήσω στο πίγμα Θα καεί από πάνω Θα καεί από πάνω και... Τα λοκένια... Ναι... Το ρίχνουμε στο φούρνο, στους 180 με 200 βαθμούς Μόλις πάρει μια σκούρα, καφέ, κρούσα από πάνω δεν είναι ψημένο. Αν δεν κάνει σκούρα, κρούσα, καφέ δεν είναι ψημένο.

[English Translation]

7645402058257894678.name: Sweet Potato Fries
7645402058257894678.description:
[Transcript]
This is sweet potato fries. Like a chef. Most sweet potato fries are either soggy, burnt, or both. That's not technique, that's chemistry. Sweet potatoes have more sugar, more water and less starch than a regular potato, meaning the surface burns before the fry ever has a chance to get really crispy. Here's the fix. Once your sweet potatoes are peeled and cut into 1 cm batons, we want to build our coating in layers. Combine plain flour for body, corn flour for light crispiness, rice flour to lock in the moisture and help the fries stay crispy. And by carbonated baking powder for added lift. Mix well and dust the sweet potatoes with 1/3 of the flour. Then pour over half the liquid water and white wine vinegar. The vinegar lowers the pH on the surface of the potato, increasing the acidity and ultimately slowing down the caramelization on the surface as it cooks. Repeat the process until all the flour, mix and liquid has been mixed through the sweet potato. This layering provides a thick, structured coating that the potato is unable to juice on its own. Heat the oil to 160 degrees, lower than you'd expect, and fry for 4 minutes. The coating needs time to set before the sugars have a chance to catch. Place onto a wire rack and season immediately. Crispy, golden sweet potato fries.

[Ollama Parsed Ingredients & Macros]

7650560484902522134.description:

BBQ sauce 1 κγ. μέλι 1/2 κγ. πάπρικα Αλάτι Πιπέρι Συνολικά, θα χρειαστείς περίιπου 1 κούπα νερό για να συμπληρώσεις στο ταψί. Καλό είναι όταν τα βγάζεις από τον φούρνο, να ρίχνεις λίγο από τη σως του ταψιού πάνω στα πανσετάκια και να συνεχίζεις το ψήσιμο όπως σου δείχνω. #porkbelly #πανσέτα #bbqsauce #dinnerideas #easyrecipes

7594976328739245343.name: Easy Homemade Pretzels
7594976328739245343.description:
Easy Homemade Pretzels Ingredients 	•	Flour (260 g | 2 cups) 	•	Water (170 g | ¾ cup) 	•	Yeast (1 tsp) 	•	Honey (1 tbsp) 	•	Salt (1 tsp) 	•	Oil (1 tbsp) ⸻ Instructions 	1.	Mix water, yeast, and honey. Leave for 10 minutes. 	2.	Add oil, flour, and salt. Mix with a spoon until combined. No kneading needed. 	3.	Cover and let rise 1½ hours, until doubled in size. 	4.	Divide dough into 4 pieces. Roll each piece into a rope and shape into pretzels as shown in the video. 	5.	Place on oven rack or baking tray, brush with egg wash, and sprinkle with coarse salt. 	6.	Bake at 480°F (250°C) for 20–25 minutes, until golden. Enjoy! ⸻ #pretzels #easyrecipe #baking #bread #recipe

[Ollama Parsed Ingredients & Macros]

7625672787226578198.name: Homemade Focaccia Bread
7625672787226578198.description:
Πήγα στο Ikoyi στο Λονδίνο, ένα από τα πιο γνωστά Michelin εστιατόρια και νο15 στην παγκόσμια κατάταξη σύμφωνα με τον οδηγό Michelin , και ειλικρινά ήταν από αυτές τις εμπειρίες που τις ονειρεύεσαι χρόνια και όταν έρχονται δυσκολεύεσαι να το πιστέψεις. Δύο μήνες στο Λονδίνο, πολλές εικόνες, πολλές γεύσεις και μια στιγμή που σίγουρα θα θυμάμαι. Η συνταγή για τη φοκάτσια:  Υλικά: 470 ml νερό 560 γρ. αλεύρι τύπου 00 40 ml ελαιόλαδο 15 γρ. αλάτι 8 γρ. ξηρή μαγιά Βάλε τη μαγιά σε χλιαρό νερό με μια πρέζα ζάχαρη και άφησέ τη να ενεργοποιηθεί. Πρόσθεσε το ενεργό μείγμα της μαγιάς στο αλεύρι και ζύμωσε καλά. Στην συνέχεια, πρόσθεσε το αλάτι και το ελαιόλαδο και ζύμωσε για ακόμη 5 λεπτά. Άφησε το ζυμάρι να ξεκουραστεί. Με βρεγμένα χέρια, δίπλωσέ το και επανάλαβε τη διαδικασία 3 φορές. Τοποθέτησε το ζυμάρι σε καλά λαδωμένο σκεύος and άφησέ το να ξεκουραστεί για 1 ώρα. Στη συνέχεια, άνοιξέ το πιέζοντας με τα δάχτυλα και πρόσθεσε τα υλικά της αρεσκείας σου . Πολλά φιλιά, Νέστορας  #φαγητό #συνταγή #μαγειρική #αγγλία #συνταγές

7618256501701905677.name: Air Fryer Fried Chicken
7618256501701905677.description:
[Transcript]
I've been working on this recipe for months and think I finally unlocked the secret to the best air fryer fried chicken with that perfect golden, crispy skin and juicy chicken that's so good, you might never need to deep fry again. Man, that chicken is seasoned to perfection. First, we're going heavy on the seasoning. Kosher salt, ground black pepper, garlic and onion powder, smoked paprika and cayenne pepper. And mix. Half of that seasoning is going straight under the chicken and every nook and cranny so it sticks. Then add 1/2 cup of buttermilk and 1/4 cup of hot sauce, which is just enough to tenderize that chicken and also act as a binder for our dredge. Cover and marinate for as long as you can wait, ideally overnight. Then in a pan, add flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and the other half of the seasoning. Mix and combine. Add a bit of water to the dry batter and mix to get those craggy bits. Then dredge the chicken until well coated. Shake off any excess and add them to a pan and spray generously with neutral oil on both sides. Air fry at 3 70 five for 12 minutes, flip, spray again, and continue air frying for 6 to 8 minutes until golden brown, crispy, and they read 1 65 internal. And follow me for more.

[Ollama Parsed Ingredients & Macros]

7601467672211197186.name: Frigadelia with Potatoes
7601467672211197186.description:
[Transcript]
Αυτό εδώ είναι, για να μας στέλνουν μηνύματα οι καρδιολόγοι μας λένε ευχαριστώ πολύ για την πελατεία Έχουμε κόψει τις πατάτες μας, βάζουμε μπόλικο αλαιόλαδο, αλάτι, πιπέρι, ρίγανη και λίγο θυμάρι Βάζουμε αποτήριζο μόλαχανικών και μισό ποτήρι χυμού περτοκάρνη Προσθέτουμε και λίγο μουστάρδο, ανακατεύουμε, καπακώνουμε και βάζουμε φωτιά ανακατεύουμε καπακώνουμε και βάζουμε φούρνο για τα φρικαδέλια μας ψιλοκόβουμε μαϊντανό λίγο δυόσμο και άνηθο σκορδάκι κόβουμε σε κομμάτια του σκότη μας προσθέτουμε ελαιόλαδο πιπεράκι αλάτι λίγο πυρκιά πάπρικα και τυρί τριμένο ανακατεύουμε όλα τα υλικά μαζί και τα αφήνουμε Ανακατεύουμε όλα τα υλικά μαζί και τα αφήνουμε στο ψυγείο να μαριναριστούν Παίρνουμε τη σκέπη μας παίρνουμε σηκώτη τυλίγουμε Σε αυτό το σημείο βάζουμε τα φρυγαδέλια από τις πατάτες το αφήνουμε ανοιχτό χωρίς καπάκι και πάμε φούρνο Η καψούδα αυτή κρατάει και όλους δεν τη χωράει Μαζί εμείς θα μείνουμε τελεία εδώ και εκεί

7568237873271426326.name: Homemade Döner Kebab
7568237873271426326.description:
[Transcript]
Just got back from Cyprus, and if there's one thing they love in Cyprus, it's a kebab. So here we're making some homemade donner. This is a family recipe, and it's much better than those dry meatloaf ones you often see. So I'll put it at the end, and you can follow along. We start by blitzing a few onions and adding those to some minced meat with some yogurt, olive oil, and a lot of seasoning to give it plenty of flavor. Then we're gonna get all of that mixed together until it's nice, smooth consistency. Then take some Parchment paper and get it nice and thin, roll it up, and then get those on a baking tray and in the oven. About halfway through, we're gonna drain that liquid so it's not swimming. Then once it's done, we're gonna unravel it, top it with some lemon juice, and get it back in the oven to make it a little bit crispy. And then we're gonna take it out and start serving in some pitta breads. Can't say I'm the best at constructing kebabs, so I did mine and then got out of the way and let the master do the rest.

7575177969237380374.name: Lemony Chickpea and Couscous Soup
7575177969237380374.description:
Μια λεμονάτη σούπα… αλλά αλλιώς. Ρεβύθια, κους κους, καρότο — και στο τέλος το ταχίνι-λεμόνι τη δένει τέλεια. Υλικά • 400 γρ. ρεβύθια μαγειρεμένα • 1 κρεμμύδι • 2 καρότα • 80–100 γρ. κους κους • 1 λίτρο ζωμό ή νερό • 2–3 κ.σ. ελαιόλαδο • Αλάτι – πιπέρι • 2 κ.σ. ταχίνι • Χυμό από 1 λεμόνι 🇺🇸 A bright, lemony soup with a twist. Chickpeas, couscous, carrots — and a tahini-lemon finish that brings everything together. Ingredients • 400 g cooked chickpeas • 1 onion • 2 carrots • 80–100 g couscous • 1 L broth or water • 2–3 tbsp olive oil • Salt – pepper • 2 tbsp tahini • Juice of 1 lemon #petrosmaounatzis #chickpeas #soup #couscous

7569823835277626644.name: Biscoff Balls
7569823835277626644.description:
CHEEKYY lil biscoff balls for christmas (or anytime let’s be real) you just need / 250g biscoff biscuits (+ an extra small packet crushed to top OR you can melt biscoff spread) 150g cream cheese packet of white chocolate melted to coat! i used ALDI brand  blitz the bikkies and cream cheese together and roll into balls pop in freezer for 15 minutes to firm up a little bit  melt your chocolate and dip each of the balls to coat! top with extra crushed biscoff or melted biscoff spread  #biscoff #christmasbaking #baking #biscoffballs #easyrecipe

7558606546742217986.name: Creamy Custard Dessert
7558606546742217986.description:
CREAMY CUSTARD DESSERT 🍮✨ INGREDIENTS:  ▪️ 3 ⅓ cups milk or plant-based milk (27 fl oz / 800ml)  ▪️ ½ cup cornstarch (2.8 oz / 80g)  ▪️ 6 egg yolks  ▪️ 1 tbsp honey (0.7 oz / 20g) or sweetener of choice  ▪️ 1 tsp vanilla extract (0.17 fl oz / 5ml)  ▪️ Cinnamon for garnish ⏳ Time: 15 min cooking + 4 hours chilling  🔥 Cooking: medium heat STEPS:  1️⃣ In a pot, whisk together the milk, cornstarch, egg yolks, honey, and vanilla while cold.  2️⃣ Heat over medium, stirring constantly with a spatula or whisk, until the mixture thickens to a custard consistency.  3️⃣ Pour into individual molds or one large mold.  4️⃣ Let cool to room temperature, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours.  5️⃣ Sprinkle with cinnamon before serving. #custardrecipe #healthydesserts #homemadedessert #vanillacustard #easyrecipes

7556045794948812062.name: Butternut Squash Gnocchi with Sage & Prosciutto
7556045794948812062.description:
Michelin Meals You'll Actually Make Ep. 1 | Butternut Squash Gnocchi with Sage & Prosciutto  From @stefano_secchi & @michelinguide , adapted by me Ingredients (2–3 servings) For the gnocchi: 	•	1 cup butternut squash purée* 	•	~1 cup all-purpose flour (may need more or less) 	•	¼ teaspoon pumpkin pie spice or nutmeg 	•	Semolina or AP flour (for dusting) *Roast cubed butternut squash at 350°F (175°C) until very soft, then blend until smooth. If watery, strain through cheesecloth before using. For the sauce: 	•	2–3 tablespoons unsalted butter 	•	4–5 sage leaves 	•	1 slice prosciutto, thinly sliced 	•	Grated Parmesan, to finish Method 	1.	Make the dough: In a large bowl, add flour, squash purée, and spice. Mix together until combined. If the dough comes together with flour left in the bowl, that’s fine. If it’s sticky, add a little more flour. Knead briefly until you have a soft, smooth dough ball. 	2.	Shape the gnocchi: Roll into ½-inch ropes (“snakes”) on a floured surface. Cut into bite-sized pieces with a bench scraper. Roll each piece over the back of a fork to make ridges. Place on a tray dusted with semolina so they don’t stick. (At this stage you can freeze them for later.) 	3.	Cook the gnocchi: Bring salted water to a boil. Add gnocchi and cook until they float, about 3 minutes. Reserve 1 cup pasta water. 	4.	Make the sauce: In a skillet over medium heat, melt butter until lightly browned and nutty. Add sage leaves and prosciutto, cooking just ~30 seconds until fragrant. 	5.	Combine: Add cooked gnocchi straight to the pan with a splash of pasta water. Toss vigorously for ~15 seconds to coat. 	6.	Finish: Serve hot with grated Parmesan.

[Ollama Parsed Ingredients & Macros]

7555693801369570582.name: Bala Baiana (Brazilian Coconut Candy)
7555693801369570582.description:
[Transcript]
This looks like a mini crème brûlée doughnut but it's not it's a popular sweet treat in Brazil called Bala Baiana it's a sweet coconut filling coated in hard caramel it's super easy to make mix together sweetened condensed milk, butter and desiccated coconuts or coconut flakes heat the mixture over a medium low flame for roughly 8 to 10 minutes keep mixing until it becomes thick and no longer sticks to the pan like this I put some cling film on my plate this is optional but the mixture is sticky so pour it onto your plate and let it cool down lightly grease your hands with vegetable or sunflower oil and shape them into balls place them on baking paper and refrigerate them refrigerating is optional but it just makes it easier to coat it in the melted sugar add one cup of sugar half a cup of water and one teaspoon of vinegar to a pot the vinegar helps to prevent the sugar from crystallising heat the mixture on a medium high heat for roughly 15 to 20 minutes until it's amber either stick a toothpick in the balls and coat it in the melted sugar or use a fork and leave it for a few minutes to harden and that's it it's easy peasy Lembu squeezy for me personally the filling tastes amazing on its own the hard sugar just makes it taste really sweet I get a lot of questions on how to get rid of the hard sugar from the pot just fill it with water and boil it stir it and once the sugar has melted pour the water down the drain and that's it

[Ollama Parsed Ingredients & Macros]

7553610560395316502.name: Vegetarian Corn Ribs
7553610560395316502.description:
[Transcript]
Back in our very first pop up, we had a goat rib on the menu, but we wanted a vegetarian option, so we tried out corn ribs. Turns out it becomes one of our most popular dishes. First, we're gonna peel off the husk. Then we're gonna steam our corn so it's a bit easier to cut and keeps it nice and juicy. Blast. Chill for a couple of minutes. One cob is one portion. We're gonna cut the corn in half, quarter it lengthwise, so you end up with eight individual ribs. We cook in oil for 5 to 6 minutes. Warning, the oil and water don't become best friends, so don't stand too close. Once they're golden, we coat them generously in our kombu seasoning. Finish with a wedge of lime. We prefer not to use a knife and fork.

[Ollama Parsed Ingredients & Macros]

7541078220603493654.name: Biscoff Banana Bread
7541078220603493654.description:
[Transcript]
So many of my friends have been in my DMS threatening me to release this recipe. And honestly, I don't blame them. Welcome back to my series, things I'd bake if I ever opened a cafe again. And this is my Bisco banana bread, a one bowl recipe that comes together so quickly and is the perfect way to use up old bananas. Look at that. Wow. It's incredible. You chuck your old bananas in a bowl, mash them up, add in your spices. I use pumpkin pie spice here because it is my absolute fave and it adds such a great depth of flavor. It even has some dark chocolate chips inside there for some extra indulgence. And it gives such a fudgy texture to the inside of this banana bread with biscoff. And it's ready to eat.

[Ollama Parsed Ingredients & Macros]
